$comment: scripts/SSAnne2F.asm — the rival intercepts the player on deck (coords (36,8)/(37,8)), FULLY AUTHORED (wave C): he walks straight down his own column to (36,7) — just above the trigger row, NOT to directly above the player, which is what lets his exit route around a player standing at (37,8) (gh #117) — the Bonjour taunt, OPP_RIVAL2 (party by the RIVAL's starter), and on a win the CUT-master hint, Music_RivalAlternateStart, the sidestep-around exit (the x==37 special case), and the map music resuming. A loss whites out normally — no after-flow, no flag.

commands.text:
{rival}: Bonjour!
{player}! Imagine seeing
you here! {player}, were you
really invited? So how's your
POKéDEX coming? I already caught
40 kinds, pal!

then.text:
{rival}: I heard
there was a CUT
master on board. But, he was just a
seasick, old man! But, CUT itself is
really useful! You should go see
him! Smell ya!
